description_long: This is a three-seater bench-style chair with a modern, utilitarian design, commonly found in public urban environments such as bus stops, train stations, or waiting areas. The chair features three individual blue seats with high, flat backrests and matching blue seat bases, all framed by a sturdy gray metal structure. Each seat is separated by angular gray armrests, providing individual support and separation for each occupant. The bench is supported by a robust, cross-shaped metal base that ensures stability and durability. The materials and construction suggest it is designed to withstand heavy use and exposure to the elements. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, prioritizing comfort and resilience in high-traffic public spaces.
description: A modern, three-seater bench with blue seats and backrests, separated by gray metal armrests and supported by a sturdy gray metal frame. Designed for public urban environments, it combines durability with a clean, functional aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing three blue seats with high backrests, separated by gray armrests and supported by a gray metal frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seats, the angle of the backrests, and the structure of the armrests and supporting base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat blue backrests and the full width of the supporting frame and legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the profile of the seats, armrests, and the sturdy base.
